moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | A lot of active frames for a jab makes this a good oki tool, can be up to +8/+1 meaty

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Extremely strong combo / pressure / oki tool with strong + frames and 4 active frames meaning it can be up to +10/+5 when used as a meaty | Hit confirmable into the b+HP Target Combo follow-up

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Forces stand | Solid whiff punish tool

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Great range for a light and has a full conversion from max range during Feng Shui Engine (Super Art Level 2) | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Very strong poke tool as well as first hit coming out in only 5F comboing from stLP | Very good when used in combination with Drive Rush

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Really far range attack that's safe on block and launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on Punish Counter (KD +45 vs grounded opponents) makes this a very strong poke and footsie tool | Also puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state on Counter-Hit / Punish Counter

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Great combo/buffer tool as well as an anti-air for horizontal approaches | +1F extra recovery frame (15F) on whiff

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Extended leg is invincible on airborne strikes on frames 8-15 | Forces stand

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Becomes fully cancelable while in Feng Shui Engine (Super Art Level 2)

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Solid low poke / buffer tool with good range | Incurs a 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Becomes fully cancelable while in Feng Shui Engine (Super Art Level 2)

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Cancelable into Divekick during forward jump while in Feng Shui Engine (Super Art Level 2) | Puts airborne opponents into a juggle state after jump canceling from crouch HP during Feng Shui Engine (Super Art level 2)

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a juggle state | Special cancelable into Divekicks

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Cross-up | Hard Knockdown on grounded opponents (KDA is higher the closer to the ground you hit them)

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Can be used as an instant Overhead

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Projectile invincible on the lower body (legs) on frames 6-20

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on the legs on frames 10-19 | Cancelable into Divekick during forward jump while in Feng Shui Engine (Super Art Level 2)

moves.name: Neutral Jump HK
moves.notes: Hits on both sides of Juri | Projectile invincible on the lower body (legs) on frames 10-13

moves.name: Kyosesho
moves.notes: Very useful combo tool as it keeps Juri closer when canceled from (including FSE chain cancels)

moves.name: Senkai Kick
moves.notes: Overhead | +2F extra recovery frames (23F) on whiff

moves.name: Renko Kicks
moves.notes: Both hits are cancelable | First hit has more hitstun for combos/cancels

moves.name: Korenzan
moves.notes: First hit forces stand on hit | Both hits are cancelable

moves.name: Death Crest 1
moves.notes: Hit confirmable from stand MP by itself | 2F gap between the hits on block

moves.name: Death Crest 2
moves.notes: The second and third hit is a true blockstring, regardless of delay | Last hit is cancelable into any Super on HIT only

moves.name: Spider Fang Throw
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up for +3 mixup between throw/strike (not possible on mid-screen back-roll) | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Shadow Kick Throw
moves.notes: Back Throw oki: Basic meaties but no meaty throw | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Zanka-sen
moves.notes: Switches sides with the opponent | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Sekkan Kick
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Kaita Raid
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: LK Fuhajin
moves.notes: Has a secondary 1-hit projectile hitbox durability on frames 8-13 | Stores 1 Fuha stock on frame 10, which enhances Juri's QCF specials

moves.name: MK Fuhajin
moves.notes: Has a secondary 1-hit projectile hitbox durability on frames 11-16 | Stores 1 Fuha stock on frame 13, which enhances Juri's QCF specials

moves.name: HK Fuhajin
moves.notes: Has a secondary 1-hit projectile hitbox durability on frames 14-19 | Stores 1 Fuha stock on frame 16, which enhances Juri's QCF specials

moves.name: OD Fuhajin
moves.notes: Has a secondary 2-hit OD Projectile hitbox durability on frames 10-17 | Stores 1 Fuha stock on frame 12, which enhances Juri's QCF specials

moves.name: Saihasho
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.028

moves.name: Saihasho (stock)
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.028

moves.name: OD Saihasho
moves.notes: 2-hit projectile (only second hit knocks down) | Projectile Speed: 0.035

moves.name: Ankensatsu
moves.notes: Airborne low crush on frames 8-27 (Forced Knockdown state) | Not cancelable into further QCF specials without using 1 Fuha stock

moves.name: Ankensatsu (stock)
moves.notes: Airborne low crush on frames 8-27 (Forced Knockdown state) | Costs 1 Fuha Stock

moves.name: OD Ankensatsu
moves.notes: Airborne low crush on frames 8-27 (Forced Knockdown state) | Cancelable into further OD QCF specials on hit / block at the cost of 1 Fuhajin stock and 1 bar of drive-gauge (OD)

moves.name: Go Ohsatsu
moves.notes: Not cancelable into further QCF specials without using 1 Fuha stock

moves.name: Go Ohsatsu (stock)
moves.notes: Costs 1 Fuha Stock | Cancelable into further QCF specials at the cost of 1 Fuha stock

moves.name: OD Go Ohsatsu
moves.notes: Cancelable into further OD QCF specials on hit / block at the cost of 1 Fuhajin stock and 1 bar of drive-gauge (OD) | All three hits are cancelable into Super levels 2 and 3 (different frame advantages depending on which hit you cancel on)

moves.name: LP Tenserin
moves.notes: First two hits are cancelable into Level 3 Super | Not airborne

moves.name: MP Tenserin
moves.notes: Invincible against airborne strikes on frames 1-8 | Airborne on frames 9-48 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HP Tenserin
moves.notes: Invincible against airborne strikes on frames 1-8 | Airborne on frames 7-48 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Tenserin
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-9 | Airborne on frames 10-56 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: Shiku-sen
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state | Cancelable into the Shiren-sen follow-up hits on HIT only

moves.name: OD Shiku-sen
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state | Cancelable into the OD Shiren-sen follow-up hits on HIT only

moves.name: > Shiren-sen
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state | Juri is in a crouch state during the 12F landing recovery

moves.name: > OD Shiren-sen
moves.notes: Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state | Juri is in a crouch state during the 7F landing recovery

moves.name: Sakkai Fuhazan (0 stock)
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-8 | Has a large trailing hurtbox immediately after super freeze to prevent fireball evasion

moves.name: Sakkai Fuhazan (1 stock)
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-8 | Has a large trailing hurtbox immediately after super freeze to prevent fireball evasion

moves.name: Feng Shui Engine
moves.notes: Duration of 600 frames (10 seconds) - The remaining timer freezes during any hitstop | Allows Juri to cancel all her normals into subsequent normals of equal or higher strength

moves.name: Feng Shui Engine (dash)
moves.notes: Armor Break | Dash is cancelable on Hit or Block into normals (FSE chain version of the normals)

moves.name: Kaisen Dankai Raku
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-13 | Armor Break

moves.name: Kaisen Dankai Raku (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-13 | Critical Art deals +500 extra over regular version (but -2 KDA)
